gates.name: closed_beta_gate
gates.blocking_reason: Closed-beta composite requires onboarding plus diagnostics plus stable-10 plus staged rollout plan; step13-16 machine evidence proves stable-10 and controlled updates but does not provide machine proof of onboarding completion.

gates.name: pilot_gate
gates.blocking_reason: No machine evidence in step13-16 artifacts for installer completion, legacy import path testing, minimum security completion, or two-week metrics.

gates.name: scale_gate
gates.blocking_reason: Controlled staged rollout to 20 is not yet evidenced as complete: captured stage-20 advance lane shows active_count_observed=16 with active_target=20.

gates.name: experimental_external_package_gate
gates.blocking_reason: No machine evidence in step13-16 artifacts for package checksum workflow and package-level private-data exclusion verification.

pilot_entry_mapping.criterion: Command API with strict JSON completed

pilot_entry_mapping.blocking_reason: No onboarding-completion machine artifact present in step13-16 source set.
UI test execution exists, but no machine artifact proves criterion-level UI completion.
No security-completion machine artifact present in step13-16 source set.
No legacy-import machine test artifact present in step13-16 source set.

unresolved_blockers.detail: Criterion 'Onboarding completed' remains unproven by machine evidence in step13-16 artifacts.
UI tests pass, but no machine artifact in step13-16 marks companion UI criterion as completed.
Minimum security completion has no machine evidence in step13-16 artifacts.
Legacy import path testing evidence is absent from step13-16 artifacts.
Pilot gate requires installer and two-week metrics; neither is machine-proven in step13-16 artifacts.
Stage-20 advance lane evidence shows active_count_observed=16 versus active_target=20, so controlled rollout to 20 is incomplete.
No package checksum/private-data exclusion evidence found in step13-16 artifacts.
